title: [Dungeon, Short Corridor]
description: The corridor is short, divided neatly down the middle by a gaping pit.  It is impossible to see just how deep it is, but it is only about six feet wide, which is a conceivably easy jump for just about anyone.  A wide iron door has been set into the wall well away from the pit, presumably to prevent the unwary from stumbling down into its depths.  There is a strange green portal on the wall opposite the door.
